meta.name: A/B Test Result Evaluator
meta.description: Calculate statistical significance of A/B test results, compute lift and confidence intervals, and recommend whether to ship, continue, or stop the test.

parameters.content:
## 26 — A/B Test Result Evaluator

Post A/B test data to the webhook to receive a statistical evaluation.

**Payload:** { test_name, control_visitors, control_conversions, variant_visitors, variant_conversions, metric, confidence_target (default: 95) }

**Required:** Google Sheets (to log results), SMTP Email
**Status:** Beta.

parameters.subject: 🧪 A/B Test: {{ $json.test_name }} — {{ $json.recommendation.toUpperCase().replace('_',' ') }}{{ $json.is_statistically_significant ? ' (' + $json.confidence_pct + '% confidence)' : ' (not significant)' }}
